reasoning: If OpenAI had announced it had achieved AGI in 2025, it would have been globally covered breaking news. Search results from throughout 2025 and 2026 clearly show ongoing discussions about *when* AGI will be achieved, not that it *has* been achieved. An April 2026 article explicitly notes 'OpenAI says 70% to AGI', proving they have not made an official announcement of achieving it. In January 2025, Altman prominently claimed 'we know how to build AGI' but this explicitly referred to a roadmap rather than a completed achievement. There is zero evidence of an official announcement by Dec 31, 2025.
